instruction: 피의자1이 보유하고 있는(has_account) 계좌(vt_bacnt)의 번호(actno)를 모두 알려줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$      MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '피의자1'})-[:has_account]->(b:vt_bacnt)      RETURN p, b, b->>'actno' AS actno $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype, actno agtype);

instruction: 계좌번호 '110-1111-1111'을 가지고 있는(has_account) 사람을 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$      MATCH (a:vt_psn)-[:has_account]->(b:vt_bacnt)      WHERE b->>'actno' = '110-1111-1111'      RETURN a, b  $$) AS (a agtype, b agtype);

instruction: 계좌 '110-1111-1111'에서 나간(from_account) 이체(vt_transfer) 내역을 모두 조회해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$     MATCH (a:vt_bacnt {actno: '110-1111-1111'})-[r:from_account]->(b:vt_bacnt)     WHERE type(r) = 'vt_transfer'     RETURN a, r, b $$) AS (a agtype, r agtype, b agtype);

instruction: 피해자2의 계좌에서 출발하여(from_account) 이체(vt_transfer)된 자금이 입금(to_account)된 목적지 계좌의 연결 경로를 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$     MATCH p = (a:vt_psn {name: '피해자2'})-[:from_account]->(b:vt_bacnt)-[:TRANSFER]->(c:vt_bacnt)     WHERE a.type = 'psn' AND b.type = 'bacnt' AND c.type = 'bacnt'     RETURN p, b, c $$) AS (path agtype, from_account agtype, to_account agtype);

instruction: 금액(amount)이 문자열 '700000'인 계좌 이체내역(vt_transfer)과 얽힌 계좌(vt_bacnt) 정보를 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$     MATCH (t:vt_transfer {amount: '700000'})<-[:related_case]-(c:vt_case)     RETURN t, c $$) AS (t agtype, c agtype);

instruction: 피의자1이 소유한 계좌(vt_bacnt)에서 발생한 이체(vt_transfer) 내역이 최종 입금(to_account)된 계좌 경로를 정리해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$     MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '피의자1'})-[:involves]->(c:vt_case)-[:related_case]->(t:vt_transfer)     WHERE t->>'type' = 'transfer' AND t->>'event_type' = 'to_account'     RETURN p, c, t $$) AS (p agtype, c agtype, t agtype);

instruction: 송금액(amount)이 문자열 '500000'이고, 대상 계좌로 입금된(to_account) 이체 내역(vt_transfer)을 5개만 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$     MATCH (t:vt_transfer {amount: '500000'})<-[:to_account]-(b:vt_bacnt)     RETURN t, b     LIMIT 5 $$) AS (n agtype, b agtype);

instruction: 계좌 '110-3333-3333'에서 나간(from_account) 역대 이체내역(vt_transfer)들을 살펴봐줘.

instruction: 피의자1로부터 시작되어 한 단계를 거쳐 닿을 수 있는 모든 계좌(vt_bacnt)를 리스트업해줘.

instruction: 피의자2가 소유한(owns_phone) 전화번호(telno)를 찾아줘.

instruction: 피해자1이 소유한 전화번호(vt_telno)를 통해 시작된(caller) 통화 내역(vt_call)을 찾아줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$     MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '피해자1'})-[:involves]->(c:vt_case)-[:caller]->(r:vt_call)     WHERE r->>'type' = 'caller'     RETURN p, c, r $$) AS (p agtype, c agtype, r agtype);

instruction: 통화시간(duration)이 문자열 '180'인 통화내역(vt_call)을 찾아줘.

instruction: 전화번호 '1000000001'을 수신자(callee)로 하는 통화 기록(vt_call)들을 시각화해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$     MATCH (c:vt_call {telno: '1000000001'})-[r]->(p:vt_psn)     RETURN c, r, p $$) AS (c agtype, r agtype, p agtype);

instruction: 피의자1과 연계된 전화번호(vt_telno)에서 발신(caller)된 통화의 시간(timestamp)을 추출해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$     MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '피의자1'})-[:involves]->(c:vt_case)-[:caller]->(r:vt_call)     RETURN p, c, r->>'timestamp' AS timestamp $$) AS (p agtype, c agtype, timestamp agtype);

instruction: 피해자1의 소유 전화번호(vt_telno)와 소유 계좌(vt_bacnt) 정보를 한눈에 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$     MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '피해자1'})-[:involves]->(c:vt_case)     MATCH (p)-[:owns_phone]->(ph:vt_telno)     MATCH (p)-[:has_account]->(ac:vt_bacnt)     RETURN p->>'name' AS 피해자명, ph->>'telno' AS 전화번호, ac->>'actno' AS 계좌번호 $$) AS (p agtype, ph agtype, ac agtype);

instruction: 피의자2가 소유한 전화에서 발신(caller)된 통화 내역이 어떤 수신자(callee) 전화번호로 갔는지 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$     MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '피의자2'})-[:owns_phone]->(ph:vt_telno)-[:caller]->(r:vt_call)     RETURN p, ph, r $$) AS (p agtype, ph agtype, r agtype);

instruction: 피의자들(vt_psn)이 공통으로 사용한(used_ip) IP 주소 목록을 가져와줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$     MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(ip:vt_ip)     WITH p, ip, count(*) as common_use_count     WHERE common_use_count > 1     RETURN p->>'name' as person_name, ip->>'ip_addr' as common_ip $$) AS (person_name agtype, common_ip agtype);

instruction: 사건 'CASE-2025-0610'에 연루된(involves) 모든 사람들의 이름(name)을 알고 싶어.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$     MATCH (c:vt_case {date: 'CASE-2025-0610'})-[:involves]->(p:vt_psn)     RETURN p->>'name' AS name $$) AS (name agtype);

instruction: 인물 피해자4와 가장 긴밀하게 연결된 자산(계좌나 번호) 정보를 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$     MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '피해자4'})-[:involves*]->(b)     RETURN p, b, max(length(p)) as max_length     ORDER BY max_length DESC     LIMIT 1 $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype, max_length int);

instruction: 발생 시간(timestamp)이 '2025-06-10 17:25:00'인 이체거래(vt_transfer)를 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$      MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '피의자1'}), (c:vt_case), (p)-[:involves]->(c), (c)-[:related_case]->(r:vt_case), (c:vt_case)-[:involves]->(r), (r)-[:related_case]->(b:vt_case)     WHERE c.date = '2025-06-10' AND r.date = '2025-06-10' AND b.date = '2025-06-10' AND c->>'timestamp' = '2025-06-10 17:25:00' AND r->>'timestamp' = '2025-06-10 17:25:00' AND b->>'timestamp' = '2025-06-10 17:25:00'     RETURN p, c, r, b $$) AS (p agtype, c agtype, r agtype, b agtype);

instruction: 계좌 '200-8888-888888'을 가지고 있는(has_account) 인물의 실제 사용 IP(vt_ip) 주소를 찾아줘.

instruction: 피의자1 소유 계좌에서 이체(vt_transfer)된 거래 내역의 타임스탬프(timestamp)를 조회해줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '피의자7'})-[:has_account]->(b:vt_bacnt) RETURN b->>'actno' AS actno $$) AS (actno agtype);

instruction: 통화시간이 '01:00:00' 이상인 통화 내역을 모두 검색해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_call) WHERE c->>'duration' >= '01:00:00' RETURN c $$) AS (c agtype);

instruction: 피해자7의 계좌를 통해 입금된(to_account) 이체 내역을 모두 나열해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b:vt_bacnt)<-[:to_account]-(t:vt_transfer)<-[:has_account]-(p:vt_psn {name: '피해자7'}) RETURN p, b, t $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype, t agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '피의자11'})-[:has_account]->(b:vt_bacnt)-[:from_account|:to_account]->(t:vt_transfer) RETURN p, b, t $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype, t agtype);

instruction: 피의자12의 전화번호로 걸려온 모든 통화 중 가장 짧은 통화를 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '피의자12'})-[:owns_phone]->(t:vt_telno)<-[:callee]-(c:vt_call) RETURN p, c ORDER BY c->>'duration' ASC LIMIT 1 $$) AS (p agtype, c agtype);

instruction: IP 주소 '203.0.113.1'을 사용한 사람과 연관된 모든 사건을 조사해줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip {address: '203.0.113.1'})<-[:related_case]-(c:vt_case) RETURN p, i, c $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype, c agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_case {type: '보이스피싱'})-[:involves]->(p:vt_psn)-[:owns_phone]->(t:vt_telno) RETURN c, p, t $$) AS (c agtype, p agtype, t agtype);

instruction: 피의자16의 계좌에서 출발하여 입금된 모든 이체 내역을 확인해줘.

instruction: 피의자17이 소유한 전화번호로 걸려온 모든 통화를 찾아줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '피의자17'})-[:owns_phone]->(t:vt_telno)<-[:callee]-(c:vt_call) RETURN p, t, c $$) AS (p agtype, t agtype, c agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer {amount: '200000'})-[:to_account]->(b:vt_bacnt) RETURN t, b $$) AS (t agtype, b agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer {amount: '300000'}) RETURN t $$) AS (t agtype);

instruction: 피의자7이 소유한 계좌(vt_bacnt)에서 발생한 모든 이체(vt_transfer)를 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '피의자7'})-[:has_account]->(b:vt_bacnt)-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer) RETURN p, b, t $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype, t agtype);

instruction: IP '10.0.0.1'을 사용한 전화번호(vt_telno)의 소유자를 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (i:vt_ip {address: '10.0.0.1'})<-[:used_by]-(t:vt_telno)<-[:owns_phone]-(p:vt_psn) RETURN i, t, p $$) AS (i agtype, t agtype, p agtype);

instruction: 전화번호 '010-1234-5678'로 발신된 모든 통화(vt_call) 내역을 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_telno {number: '010-1234-5678'})-[:caller]->(c:vt_call) RETURN t, c $$) AS (t agtype, c agtype);

instruction: 피의자8이 연루된 모든 사건(vt_case)과 관련된 계좌(vt_bacnt)를 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '피의자8'})-[:involves]->(c:vt_case)-[:related_case]->(b:vt_bacnt) RETURN p, c, b $$) AS (p agtype, c agtype, b agtype);

instruction: 피의자9가 소유한 계좌(vt_bacnt)에서 출발하여 도착(to_account)한 모든 이체(vt_transfer)를 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '피의자9'})-[:has_account]->(b:vt_bacnt)-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN p, b, t, b2 $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

instruction: 전화번호 '010-8765-4321'로 걸려온 통화(vt_call) 내역을 모두 보여줘.

instruction: 피의자10이 사용한 IP 주소(vt_ip)로 접근한 모든 계좌(vt_bacnt)를 보여줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH p = (a:vt_psn {name: '피해자3'})-[:has_account]->(b:vt_bacnt)-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(c:vt_bacnt) RETURN p, b, t, c $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype, t agtype, c agtype);

instruction: 송금액(amount)이 문자열 '300000'인 이체(vt_transfer) 내역과 관련된 사건(vt_case)을 보여줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer {amount: '300000'})<-[:related_case]-(c:vt_case) RETURN t, c $$) AS (t agtype, c agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (ip:vt_ip {ip: '192.168.0.1'})<-[:used_ip]-(p:vt_psn) RETURN p, ip $$) AS (p agtype, ip agtype);

instruction: 피해자3의 계좌에서 출발하여(from_account) 두 단계 경유한(to_account) 이체 경로를 모두 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH p = (p:vt_psn {name: '피해자3'})-[:has_account]->(b1:vt_bacnt)-[:from_account]->(t1:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt)-[:from_account]->(t2:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b3:vt_bacnt) RETURN p $$) AS (p agtype);

instruction: 전화번호 '010-9876-5432'에서 발신된(caller) 통화의 총 건수를 알려줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (tel:vt_telno {telno: '010-9876-5432'})-[:caller]->(call:vt_call) RETURN count(call) AS call_count $$) AS (call_count agtype);

instruction: 공범 관계로 연결된(involves) 모든 사건(vt_case)을 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c1:vt_case)-[:involves]->(p:vt_psn)-[:involves]->(c2:vt_case) WHERE c1 <> c2 RETURN c1, c2 $$) AS (c1 agtype, c2 agtype);

instruction: 금액(amount)이 문자열 '300000' 이상인 이체(vt_transfer) 내역을 조회해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer) WHERE t->>'amount' >= '300000' RETURN t $$) AS (t agtype);

instruction: 피의자5와 관련된 모든 사건(vt_case) 경로를 세 단계까지 보여줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH p = (p:vt_psn {name: '피의자5'})-[:involves*1..3]->(c:vt_case) RETURN p $$) AS (p agtype);

instruction: '2023-01-01' 이후 발생한 사건(vt_case)의 세부 정보를 조회해줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_case) WHERE c->>'date' > '2023-01-01' RETURN c $$) AS (c agtype);

instruction: 계좌 '220-3333-4444'에서 출발하여(from_account) 도착(to_account)하는 모든 이체 경로를 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH p = (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '220-3333-4444'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN p $$) AS (p agtype);

instruction: 전화번호 '010-5555-6666'이 소유한(owns_phone) 피의자를 찾아줘.

instruction: 금액(amount)이 문자열 '1000000' 이하인 이체(vt_transfer) 내역을 조회해줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer) WHERE t->>'amount' <= '1000000' RETURN t $$) AS (t agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_case {name: '사기 사건 1'})-[:involves]->(p:vt_psn)-[:owns_phone]->(t:vt_telno) RETURN c, p, t $$) AS (c agtype, p agtype, t agtype);

instruction: 전화번호 '010-1234-5678'로 전화를 건 모든 전화를 찾아줘.
